zh.Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.Balwearie Castle, Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotl: 蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie於1425年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie51歲，母親Mrs. Michael Scott43歲。他於1453年與Lady Isabel Moncrieffe在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年在蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie于1425年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie51岁，母亲Mrs. Michael Scott43岁。他于1453年与Lady Isabel Moncrieffe在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年在苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie was born in 1425, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie, was 51 and his mother, Mrs. Michael Scott, was 43. He married Lady Isabel Moncrieffe in 1453, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1498, in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie est né en 1425, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Michael Scott, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabel Moncrieffe en 1453, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1498, à Kirkcaldy, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie 1425 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie 51 und seine Mutter Mrs. Michael Scott 43. Er hat 1453 in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland Lady Isabel Moncrieffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1498 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie è nato il nel 1425 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Michael Scott, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabel Moncrieffe nel 1453, nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1498, nel Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearieが1425年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearieは51歳，母Mrs. Michael Scottは43歳であった。1453年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディでLady Isabel Moncrieffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年にスコットランドフィフキルクカルディで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie(이)가 1425년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Michael Scott(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1453년 스컷랜드 피프 커크캘디에서 Lady Isabel Moncrieffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 스컷랜드 피프 커크캘디에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie nasceu em 1425, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Michael Scott, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabel Moncrieffe em 1453, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1498, em Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie родился в 1425 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Michael Scott, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabel Moncrieffe в 1453 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1498 г. в местности кирккалди, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Scott 7th of Balwearie nació en 1425, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir Michael Scott 6th of Balwearie, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mrs. Michael Scott, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Lady Isabel Moncrieffe en 1453, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1498, en Kirkcaldy, Fife, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años.
